purpose: GRPO RL train/eval split (distinct from scripts/m1_eval_task_split.json, which was an SFT seen/unseen split for eval-reliability). Deterministic interleave: eval = task ids with id%5 in {0,1}; train = the rest. Interleaving spreads both sets across the full id range to avoid difficulty bias.
eval_protocol: pass^1 on the 20 eval (held-out) tasks is the headline metric; also report pass^1 on a sample of train tasks (fitting check). Tighten eval CI with k>1 trials (pass^k) once a candidate adapter beats base.
